latest.title: Tigers wear stripe shadows as camouflage
latest.script_key: tigers use stripes to break up their outline watch the stripes against grass and shade because they split the body outline into harder pieces to track that camouflage helps a big animal get closer before prey locks on the pattern is stealth not decoration would you spot the tiger first

latest.title: Rock layers store ancient environments in stripes
latest.script_key: rock layers are time stamps made of stone watch the stripe pattern because each layer can mark a different setting river mud ocean floor windblown sand or volcanic ash stack enough layers and the cliff becomes a timeline which rock clue should we read next

latest.title: Cows remember faces across the herd
latest.script_key: cows can remember who belongs in the herd watch the calm face first because cows can recognize familiar herd members and people that memory lowers stress when the group feels predictable a quiet look can carry more history than it seems which farm animal should we explain next

latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
latest.script_key: the moon shows us one face for a reason watch the moon s position because its rotation and orbit are locked together it spins once in about the same time it circles earth so the same side keeps facing us that is synchronized motion not stillness which orbit clue next

latest.title: Fossils turn old bones into time clues
latest.script_key: fossils can preserve a clue from deep time watch the shape in the rock because fossils form when buried remains leave mineral records behind the original body is gone but the pattern can reveal age habitat and behavior which ancient clue should we read next

latest.title: Lightning makes air explode into thunder

latest.title: Border collies train their puppies to hunt like pros
latest.script_key: that pup isn t just playing that s school watch the pup copy the adult s moves exactly because herding isn t born it s taught that s why border collies nudge their young like tiny sheepdogs so do you think puppies learn this from watching or from getting bumped

latest.title: Horses sleep standing without falling over
latest.script_key: horses can lock their legs while resting watch the legs when the body looks calm because horses have a stay apparatus that helps support them while they rest it lets them doze and react quickly if danger appears the nap is built for speed would you sleep like that

latest.title: Rocky Mountains aren’t as old as you think
latest.script_key: those peaks aren t ancient see the jagged ridge that s a fresh fracture where ice pried the rock apart overnight the glaciers above are carving valleys faster than the mountains rise because ice is stronger than rock when it moves that s why your mental image of timeless mountains is wrong some of these faces were born yesterday

latest.title: Pine trees hide their real height trick
latest.script_key: watch how its roots sprawl wider than the branches that s why it stands so straight without toppling pine trees brace themselves underground because those roots grip soil like fingers in a carpet did you picture tree roots this big

latest.title: Birds see ultraviolet patterns we miss
latest.script_key: birds see colors humans cannot see watch the feathers and eyes because many birds see ultraviolet detail hidden from us that extra color can help with mates food and navigation the same scene is richer to them than it is to us which bird fact next

latest.title: Pelicans groom with oil they make themselves
latest.script_key: here s the part nobody tells you that oil on its wings isn t pond scum it s lotion this pelican makes watch its head touch that spot above the tail that s the oil gland it s not preening it s applying sunscreen and waterproofing that s why it can crash dive without soaking up weight

latest.title: Forests can cool the air below them
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next
